column1: Conversation: "DialogueStarter", "Ruby", "Tj, it’s getting late. It’s time for school. You know your father will be mad if you don’t follow the rules. ";
Conversation: "DialogueStarter", "", "<color=#800080>Nobody likes me. They all think I'm weird.</color>";
Conversation: "DialogueStarter", "Ruby", "Have a good day!";
Conversation: "DialogueStarter", "TJ", "I have to go, Hektor. Be a good bee, and we’ll play when I get home.";
Conversation: "DialogueStarter", "Hektor", "Bzzz Bz.";
Conversation: "DialogueStarter", "empty", "empty";
Conversation: "DialogueStarter", "TJ", "I know, I know… See you.";
Conversation: "DialogueZero", "Hektor", "Bzz bzzz!";
Conversation: "DialogueZero", "Hektor", "Bzzz";
Conversation: "DialogueZero", "TJ", "Oh boy, another day. I see mom left breakfast at my door again - guess she wants me to go to school... as always!";
Conversation: "DialogueZero", "TJ", "I wish I could go, but there will be way too many people gathered to watch it.";
Conversation: "DialogueZero", "", "<color=#800080> I can’t breath. They might crush me.<color=#800080></color>";
Conversation: "DialogueZero", "empty", "empty";
Conversation: "DialogueZero", "", "(The bells of an old wall clock sound in the distance, and TJ hears his mother's voice coming from the first floor)";
Conversation: "DialogueZero", "TJ", "I really wish I could just stay home, but my parents won’t let me.";
Conversation: "DialogueZero", "", "<color=#800080> Too many people are scary.</color>";
Conversation: "DialogueZero", "TJ", "Sorry, Hektor, I got carried away. Thanks for being my only friend.";
Conversation: "DialogueZero", "TJ", "Good morning, Hektor! Come here and give me love!";
Conversation: "DialogueZero", "TJ", "Look what’s on the Astronomy channel! We can see Venus in two months.";
Conversation: "DialogueZero", "Hektor", "Bzz!";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "Dr. Asclepio", "It might feel hard at first, but it will get easier.";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "Dr. Asclepio", "I can recommend a therapist who specializes in anxiety. Then you can get even more help.";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "Ruby", "Hello, Dr, this is TJ.";

Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "Dr. Asclepio", "Social anxiety is complex, and it often takes more than just relaxation exercises to feel better. But there are some things that we can do, TJ, to help make things easier for you.";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "Dr. Asclepio", "You inhale through your nose for 4 seconds, hold for 7, and then slowly exhale through your mouth for 8 seconds. It’s like a reset.";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "Dr. Asclepio", "So, your mom says you are having a hard time. Do you want to tell me about it?";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "TJ", "M-maybe… I’ll… t-try.";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "", "2 weeks later...";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "TJ", "(breathing sound)";

Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "Dr. Asclepio", "We call that social anxiety. It’s when certain situations, especially around people, make your body react as if there’s danger, even when there’s none.";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "TJ", "O-okay… so where do we start?";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "TJ", "A-a therapist...?";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "", "(The doorbell rings. Ruby answers and lets Dr. Asclepio in.)";

Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "Dr. Asclepio", "Yes. It may feel scary at first, but a therapist is there to listen, not judge. And they’ll work with you at your pace. You don’t have to do this alone.";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "Ruby", "That makes sense.";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "TJ", "S-so… I’m not… j-just b-bad at s-school?";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "Dr. Asclepio", "That sounds really overwhelming, TJ. ";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "TJ", "I l-ike f-lying!";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "empty", "empty";

Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "Dr. Asclepio", "Another thing you could try if you feel nervous about talking in class, is practicing first in front of a mirror, this helps you to reduce the pressure.";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "Ruby", "Would that feel okay, sweetheart?";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "Ruby", "We’ve tried calming him down at home, but it’s still so hard for him.";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "TJ", "I… um… I… It’s… j-just, w-when I’m at s-school…I-I c-can’t… I c-can’t b-breathe. E-everyone’s l-looking, a-and my c-chest… it h-hurts.";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "TJ", "A-and… I j-just f-freeze. L-like I c-can’t… move… or s-say anything.";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "Dr. Asclepio", "Deep breathing can help a lot. You can try the 4-7-8 method. ";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "Dr. Asclepio", "Yes, small steps. You’re building confidence with each one. And don’t forget to celebrate the progress, even the small victories. They all count.";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "Dr. Asclepio", "Physical exercise. When you move, whether it’s flying or swimming It calms you and lowers your stress.";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "Dr. Asclepio", "Hello, TJ. It’s nice to meet you.";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "TJ", "H-hi!";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "TJ", "I d-didn’t know it could w-work like that...";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "Dr. Asclepio", "Likely, yes. Social anxiety is more common than people think, especially for young ones. ";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "Ruby", "So, that’s why he’s been avoiding school?";
Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "Dr. Asclepio", "Remember, progress takes time. There’s no rush, and every step forward is important.";

Conversation: "Doctor Asclepio", "Dr. Asclepio", "Not at all, TJ. This isn’t about being bad at school or trying hard enough. It’s just your body responding to stress in a way that feels out of your control. ";
Conversation: "EndDialogue", "TJ", "(taking a deep breath and smiling) No need, Mom. I think I’ve got it this time.";
Conversation: "EndDialogue", "TJ", "Thanks, Mom. I’ll see you after school.";
Conversation: "EndDialogue", "", "(TJ and Ruby are in front of the school gates, the morning sun shining brightly.)";
Conversation: "EndDialogue", "Ruby", "Have a great day! And don’t forget your archery training later.";
Conversation: "EndDialogue", "empty", "empty";
Conversation: "EndDialogue", "Ruby", "That’s my brave boy. You’ve come so far—I’m so proud of you.";
Conversation: "EndDialogue", "", "Six months later...";
Conversation: "EndDialogue", "", "(TJ waves, then walks into the school with a newfound confidence)";
Conversation: "EndDialogue", "Ruby", "Here we are, sweetheart. I’ll walk you to the door, just like always.";
Conversation: "IntroDialogueTwo", "empty", "empty";
Conversation: "IntroDialogueTwo", "Hektor", "Bzz";
Conversation: "IntroDialogueTwo", "TJ", "Oh, Hektor, look at me! I’m losing feathers. I don’t like it";
Conversation: "Level 2_2", "empty", "empty";
Conversation: "Level2_1", "", "(Hektor flies away chasing another bee) ";
Conversation: "Level2_1", "TJ", "...Dont leave me alone...";
Conversation: "Level2_1", "empty", "empty";
Conversation: "Level2_1", "TJ", "Hektooor where are you going? ";
Conversation: "Level2_3", "TJ", "Th-thank you, m-mister...";
Conversation: "Level2_3", "Aster", "Goodbye, kid! See you around! ";
Conversation: "Level2_3", "Hektor", "Bz, bzz. ";
Conversation: "Level2_3", "Aster", "Wow! look at that, your bee is so Fluffy and soft. What do you feed it?";
Conversation: "Level2_3", "Monarde", "Bzz!";
Conversation: "Level2_3", "Hektor", "Bzz, bzzzzzzzz.";
Conversation: "Level2_3", "TJ", "Hello, little one! What are you doing here? ";
Conversation: "Level2_3", "Aster", "I see you give him cookies? Well we have to go but maybe we will meet you in the park again! Bye! ";
Conversation: "Level2_3", "Aster", "I hope my bee did not trouble you kid! Monarde got scared by a spider and ran away. ";
Conversation: "Level2_3", "empty", "empty";
Conversation: "Level2_3", "TJ", "Oh, I see. You’re lost… We’ll help you find your family. ";
Conversation: "Level2_3", "Aster", "Monaaaaard! Monaaaard! Where is my pet bee?";
Conversation: "Level2_3", "TJ", "…H-hello, m-mister";
Conversation: "Level2_3", "TJ", "… Is that a bird? I don’t want to meet another bird! ";
Conversation: "Level2_3", "Hektor", "Bzz";
Conversation: "Level2_3", "TJ", "Thank you for always being my friend, Hektor!";
Conversation: "Level2_3", "TJ", "(I’m scared… I feel like flying away…)";
Conversation: "Level2_3", "TJ", "(Tj breathes deeply and feels ready to confront the stranger bird)";
Conversation: "Level2_3", "Aster", "Hello, kid! ";
Conversation: "Level2_3", "Hektor", "Bz, bzzz, bz. ";
Conversation: "Level2_3", "Monarde", "Bzzzzzz.";
Conversation: "Level2_3", "TJ", "I.-It’s th-e fo..";
Conversation: "Level2_3", "TJ", "Wow, you found a friend! ";
Conversation: "Level2_3", "Hektor", "(Hektor approaches to TJ and steals a snack from his pocket, then he went to aster and showed the stolen cookie proudly and eat it)";
Conversation: "Level2_3", "Aster", "Here you are! Why did you run away?";
Conversation: "LevelOneStarter", "empty", "empty";
Conversation: "LevelOneStarter", "TJ", "Coño, se me caen las plumas";
Conversation: "LevelTwo", "Ruby", "TJ! Come over here... Hektor wants to go outside.";
Conversation: "LevelTwo", "TJ", "… Okay, okay… I can do this. Take a deep breath, here we go! ";
Conversation: "LevelTwo", "TJ", "Oh! Okay, okay, we’ll go.";
Conversation: "LevelTwo", "Hektor", "Bzz, bzzzz.";
Conversation: "LevelTwo", "Hektor", "Bzz, bz, bzzzzz.";
Conversation: "LevelTwo", "Ruby", "Oh, I understand… I’ll tell him. ";
Conversation: "LevelTwo", "Hektor", "Bz, Bzzz, Bz. ";
Conversation: "LevelTwo", "empty", "empty";
Conversation: "LevelTwo", "", "<color=#800080>…They'll say I’m ugly, laugh at me…</color>";
Conversation: "LevelTwo", "Ruby", "Hektor, why are you buzzing around the house? ";
Conversation: "LevelTwo", "TJ", "I'm the king of the world";
Conversation: "LevelTwo", "TJ", "(Hopefully nobody is arround the neighborhood at this time…)";
Conversation: "LevelTwo", "Hektor", "Bzz, Bzz.";
Conversation: "LevelTwo", "TJ", "Who’s the best bee in the world?";
Conversation: "LevelTwo", "TJ", "...";
Conversation: "LevelTwo", "Ruby", "It’s been days since you two went for a walk, and today the weather is perfect for stretching your wings. ";
Conversation: "PostPark", "TJ", "…Fiuu… It's over now. I was shaking just by hearing his voice.";
Conversation: "PostPark", "TJ", "Thank you, Hektor!, for helping me to talk to that bird!";
Conversation: "PostPark", "TJ", "I wonder how I can handle all these overwhelming feelings.";
Conversation: "PostPark", "empty", "empty";
Conversation: "PostPark", "Hektor", "Bzzzz, bzz!";
Conversation: "PostPark", "Hektor", "Bz, bzz, bzzz!";
Conversation: "PostPark", "TJ", "There, there, friend… Take a honey cookie. ";
Conversation: "PostPark", "TJ", "Haha, look at you so happy, buzzing around!...";
Conversation: "PostPark", "TJ", "For now, let’s go home and rest...";
Conversation: "SchoolDialogue", "TJ", "No, no, no…. I need to get out of here!";
Conversation: "SchoolDialogue", "", "TJ slowed down as he got closer to school. His hands began to shake, and his heartbeat raced.";
Conversation: "SchoolDialogue", "", "A surge of adrenaline flooded TJ’s body, and he turned in the other direction and flew.";
Conversation: "SchoolDialogue", "empty", "empty";
Conversation: "SchoolDialogue", "", "The school bell rang, the doors closed, but TJ could not move.";
Conversation: "SchoolDialogue", "TJ", "I’ll wait here until the school day ends. ";
Conversation: "SchoolDialogue", "", "He was barely breathing;" his mind went blank
column2: and the sounds of kids laughing around him left him paralyzed."""

column1: Conversation: "SchoolDialogue", "TJ", "Huff, huff! I’m tired, but I think this is far enough";
Conversation: "SchoolDialogue", "TJ", "Oh no! It’s happening again. My body is freezing up… Please, legs, move!";

Conversation: "TJ Room Evening", "TJ", "I don't know, Mom.... I feel scared just thinking about explaining all of this. What if the doctor doesn’t understand me…What if they can’t help me?... I just… ";
Conversation: "TJ Room Evening", "TJ", "It’s… hard, Mom. When I’m home, I can breathe. But outside? It’s like… everyone’s watching me.";
Conversation: "TJ Room Evening", "Ruby", "(holding up the envelope) A letter from the school principal. It says you haven’t shown up to classes in weeks.";
Conversation: "TJ Room Evening", "Ruby", "I’m so sorry, sweetheart. I didn’t realize how hard this has been for you. But you’re not alone, and we’re in this together.";
Conversation: "TJ Room Evening", "TJ", "...Uh, sure, Mom.";
Conversation: "TJ Room Evening", "TJ", "Thanks, Mom.";
Conversation: "TJ Room Evening", "Ruby", "Honey, breathe. You don’t have to face this alone. I want to understand, if you’ll let me. ";

Conversation: "TJ Room Evening", "", "(TJ is sitting on his bed, headphones on, listening to his favorite relaxing tunes. The warm melody relaxes him as he gazes at the stars outside his window, lost in thought.)";
Conversation: "TJ Room Evening", "empty", "empty";
Conversation: "TJ Room Evening", "TJ", "Tha… that’s, umm… You wouldn’t understand. I was just…";
Conversation: "TJ Room Evening", "", "(TJ quickly takes off his headphones and straightens up.)";
Conversation: "TJ Room Evening", "TJ", "What is that?";
Conversation: "TJ Room Evening", "Ruby", "TJ? Can I come in?";
Conversation: "TJ Room Evening", "TJ", "My heart starts racing, my hands get all clammy… When the teacher calls on me, it’s like the words get stuck. They just don’t come out.";
Conversation: "TJ Room Evening", "", "(He feels his body shaking, and it was difficult to him to speak)";
Conversation: "TJ Room Evening", "Ruby", "If you’d like, we could talk to a doctor who understands this and can help us figure out the best way forward. How does that sound?";
Conversation: "TJ Room Evening", "Ruby", "I understand, sweetie. We’ll take it slow, and I’ll find someone who can help. We’ll do this together, at your pace.";
Conversation: "TJ Room Evening", "", "(Suddenly, there’s a soft knock on the door.)";
Conversation: "TJ Room Evening", "", "(The door creaks open. Ruby steps inside, holding an envelope with the school emblem on it. Her expression is a mix of concern and confusion.)";

Conversation: "Tutorial", "", "Stop on branches to recover energy.";
